assertion_results.text: The answer mentions `pytest-asyncio` or equivalent async pytest support
The answer includes `@pytest.mark.asyncio` or an equivalent async test marker
assertion_results.evidence:
Shows markers: "Use marks on async tests: @pytest.mark.asyncio" and alternative: "Mark tests with @pytest.mark.anyio"; code snippets include:
"@pytest.mark.asyncio\nasync def test_async_function(): ..." and "@pytest.mark.anyio\nasync def test_with_client(async_client): ..."

assertion_results.text: The answer mentions awaiting the async function or using an async fixture pattern
assertion_results.evidence:
Awaiting calls shown: "result = await some_async_function()" and "resp = await async_client.get("/health")". Async fixture pattern included with: "@pytest_asyncio.fixture
async def async_client():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(...) as client:
        yield client" and an async pytest fixture under pytest-anyio.
